title: 「Each + 單數名詞」句型
titleEn: Using each + singular noun to focus on individuals

source.file: Sentence Sturcture 41 -「Each + 單數名詞」逐一表達.pdf

formula: Each + singular countable noun / noun phrase + singular verb + other information

formulas.formula: Each + singular countable noun / noun phrase + singular verb + other information
Subject + verb + each + singular countable noun / noun phrase + other information

example: Each additional child means an extra financial responsibility.
exampleZh: 每多一個孩子，就意味著多一份經濟責任。

examples.en: Each additional child means an extra financial responsibility.
examples.zh: 每多一個孩子，就意味著多一份經濟責任。

meaning.zh: Each 把注意力放在群體中的每一個成員，常用於逐一分配、個別安排和每次發生的事情。

rules.en: Use a singular countable noun after each.
rules.zh: Each 後面使用單數可數名詞。

rules.en: Use a singular verb when an each-phrase is the subject.
rules.zh: Each 名詞短語作主語時，使用單數動詞。

rules.en: Each may also appear after a verb.
rules.zh: Each 亦可以放在動詞後面；此時動詞形式由前面的主語決定。
examples: The teacher gives each group a map.

rules.en: Each emphasises members one by one.
rules.zh: Each 強調逐一看待每個人或事物。
examples: Each student receives a different task.

rules.en: Each time means every time an event happens.
examples: Each time the bell rings, the students change classrooms.

rules.en: This lesson focuses on each + singular noun, not each of or each other.
rules.zh: 本課集中訓練 each＋單數名詞，不包括 each of 或 each other。

benefits.en: It clearly emphasises every individual member.
benefits.zh: 它能清楚強調群體中的每一個成員。
它能清楚表達一對一的分配關係。

benefits.en: It explains the result of each additional unit.
benefits.zh: 它適合表達「每增加一個，就多一個結果」。
它能把逐一說明每個人的較長說法縮短。

benefits.en: It is useful for rules, charges and repeated events.
benefits.zh: 它適合說明規則、收費、責任和每次重複發生的事情。

en: Rewrite each sentence using each + singular countable noun or each time.
Keep every answer as a complete sentence and preserve the original meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 each＋單數可數名詞或 each time 改寫以下句子。
每個答案必須是完整句子，並保留原句意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Every student receives a worksheet.
questions.promptZh: 每名學生都會收到一份工作紙。
questions.answer: Each student receives a worksheet.
questions.answerZh: 每名學生都會收到一份工作紙。
questions.highlight: Each student receives a worksheet.

questions.prompt: All the rooms have their own window.
questions.promptZh: 所有房間都有自己的窗戶。
questions.answer: Each room has its own window.
questions.answerZh: 每個房間都有自己的窗戶。
questions.highlight: Each room has its own window.

questions.prompt: Every player wears a numbered shirt.
questions.promptZh: 每名球員都穿着有號碼的球衣。
questions.answer: Each player wears a numbered shirt.
questions.answerZh: 每名球員都穿着有號碼的球衣。
questions.highlight: Each player wears a numbered shirt.

questions.prompt: A ticket costs ten dollars, no matter which one you buy.
questions.promptZh: 無論你購買哪一張門票，價格都是十元。
questions.answer: Each ticket costs ten dollars.
questions.answerZh: 每張門票售價十元。
questions.highlight: Each ticket costs ten dollars.

questions.prompt: Every group gets one map from the teacher.
questions.promptZh: 每組都會從老師那裏獲得一張地圖。
questions.answer: The teacher gives each group a map.
questions.answerZh: 老師給每組一張地圖。
questions.highlight: The teacher gives each group a map.

questions.prompt: All the children choose one book individually.
questions.promptZh: 所有孩子都各自選擇一本書。
questions.answer: Each child chooses one book.
questions.answerZh: 每個孩子選擇一本書。
questions.highlight: Each child chooses one book.

questions.prompt: All the tables seat four people.
questions.promptZh: 所有桌子都可供四人入座。
questions.answer: Each table seats four people.
questions.answerZh: 每張桌子可供四人入座。
questions.highlight: Each table seats four people.

questions.prompt: Every visitor receives a name badge from the receptionist.
questions.promptZh: 每名訪客都會從接待員那裏收到一個名牌。
questions.answer: The receptionist gives each visitor a name badge.
questions.answerZh: 接待員給每名訪客一個名牌。
questions.highlight: The receptionist gives each visitor a name badge.

questions.prompt: There is one litre of water in every bottle.
questions.promptZh: 每個瓶子內都有一公升水。
questions.answer: Each bottle contains one litre of water.
questions.answerZh: 每個瓶子盛有一公升水。
questions.highlight: Each bottle contains one litre of water.

questions.prompt: Two marks are awarded for every question.
questions.promptZh: 每道題目可獲兩分。
questions.answer: Each question carries two marks.
questions.answerZh: 每道題目佔兩分。
questions.highlight: Each question carries two marks.

questions.prompt: All employees have personal lockers of their own.
questions.promptZh: 所有僱員都有自己的私人儲物櫃。
questions.answer: Each employee has a personal locker.
questions.answerZh: 每名僱員都有一個私人儲物櫃。
questions.highlight: Each employee has a personal locker.

questions.prompt: The coach speaks to all the players separately.
questions.promptZh: 教練分別與所有球員交談。
questions.answer: The coach speaks to each player separately.
questions.answerZh: 教練逐一與每名球員交談。
questions.highlight: The coach speaks to each player separately.

questions.prompt: Every family receives one food box.
questions.promptZh: 每個家庭都會收到一箱食物。
questions.answer: Each family receives a food box.
questions.answerZh: 每個家庭都會收到一箱食物。
questions.highlight: Each family receives a food box.

questions.prompt: We put one candle on every table.
questions.promptZh: 我們在每張桌子上放一支蠟燭。
questions.answer: We put a candle on each table.
questions.answerZh: 我們在每張桌子上放一支蠟燭。
questions.highlight: We put a candle on each table.

questions.prompt: All buses stop at the main station.
questions.promptZh: 所有巴士都會在總站停靠。
questions.answer: Each bus stops at the main station.
questions.answerZh: 每輛巴士都會在總站停靠。
questions.highlight: Each bus stops at the main station.

questions.prompt: Every customer is given a receipt by the shop.
questions.promptZh: 店舖會給每名顧客一張收據。
questions.answer: The shop gives each customer a receipt.
questions.answerZh: 店舖給每名顧客一張收據。
questions.highlight: The shop gives each customer a receipt.

questions.prompt: The length of every lesson is forty minutes.
questions.promptZh: 每堂課的長度都是四十分鐘。
questions.answer: Each lesson lasts forty minutes.
questions.answerZh: 每堂課長四十分鐘。
questions.highlight: Each lesson lasts forty minutes.

questions.prompt: The nurse checked the patients’ temperatures one by one.
questions.promptZh: 護士逐一量度病人的體溫。
questions.answer: The nurse checked each patient’s temperature.
questions.answerZh: 護士逐一量度每名病人的體溫。
questions.highlight: The nurse checked each patient’s temperature.

questions.prompt: No answer may be only a phrase; all answers must be complete sentences.
questions.promptZh: 答案不可以只是一個短語；所有答案都必須是完整句子。
questions.answer: Each answer must be a complete sentence.
questions.answerZh: 每個答案都必須是一個完整句子。
questions.highlight: Each answer must be a complete sentence.

questions.prompt: The guide took every guest to a seat.
questions.promptZh: 導遊帶每名賓客到座位。
questions.answer: The guide took each guest to a seat.
questions.answerZh: 導遊逐一帶每名賓客到座位。
questions.highlight: The guide took each guest to a seat.

questions.prompt: For every additional bag, the charge is five dollars.
questions.promptZh: 每增加一件行李，收費便是五元。
questions.answer: Each additional bag costs five dollars.
questions.answerZh: 每多一件行李，便需支付五元。
questions.highlight: Each additional bag costs five dollars.

questions.prompt: The bill increases by twenty dollars whenever the stay is extended by one day.
questions.promptZh: 每當住宿期延長一天，帳單便增加二十元。
questions.answer: Each extra day adds twenty dollars to the bill.
questions.answerZh: 每多住一天，帳單便增加二十元。
questions.highlight: Each extra day adds twenty dollars to the bill.

questions.prompt: Whenever a new member joins, that person brings a different skill to the team.
questions.promptZh: 每當有新成員加入，那人都會為團隊帶來一項不同的技能。
questions.answer: Each new member brings a different skill to the team.
questions.answerZh: 每名新成員都會為團隊帶來一項不同的技能。
questions.highlight: Each new member brings a different skill to the team.

questions.prompt: Every student is given an online account by the school.
questions.promptZh: 學校會給每名學生一個網上帳戶。
questions.answer: The school gives each student an online account.
questions.answerZh: 學校給每名學生一個網上帳戶。
questions.highlight: The school gives each student an online account.

questions.prompt: Two staff members check every application.
questions.promptZh: 兩名職員會檢查每份申請。
questions.answer: Each application is checked by two staff members.
questions.answerZh: 每份申請都由兩名職員檢查。
questions.highlight: Each application is checked by two staff members.

questions.prompt: Staff place one safety card on every seat.
questions.promptZh: 職員在每個座位上放置一張安全須知卡。
questions.answer: A safety card is placed on each seat.
questions.answerZh: 每個座位上都放有一張安全須知卡。
questions.highlight: A safety card is placed on each seat.

questions.prompt: No two bedrooms share a bathroom; every bedroom has its own.
questions.promptZh: 沒有兩間睡房共用浴室；每間睡房都有自己的浴室。
questions.answer: Each bedroom has its own bathroom.
questions.answerZh: 每間睡房都有自己的浴室。
questions.highlight: Each bedroom has its own bathroom.

questions.prompt: The organiser gave every volunteer a specific task.
questions.promptZh: 主辦者給每名義工一項指定任務。
questions.answer: The organiser gave each volunteer a specific task.
questions.answerZh: 主辦者給每名義工一項指定任務。
questions.highlight: The organiser gave each volunteer a specific task.

questions.prompt: For every mistake, one mark is taken off the final score.
questions.promptZh: 每犯一個錯誤，總分便會被扣一分。
questions.answer: Each mistake reduces the final score by one mark.
questions.answerZh: 每個錯誤都會令總分減少一分。
questions.highlight: Each mistake reduces the final score by one mark.

questions.prompt: The amount of water needed is different for every plant.
questions.promptZh: 每株植物所需的水量都不同。
questions.answer: Each plant needs a different amount of water.
questions.answerZh: 每株植物所需的水量都不同。
questions.highlight: Each plant needs a different amount of water.

questions.prompt: Whenever the bell rings, the students change classrooms.
questions.promptZh: 每當鐘聲響起，學生便會轉到另一間課室。
questions.answer: Each time the bell rings, the students change classrooms.
questions.answerZh: 每次鐘聲響起，學生便會轉到另一間課室。
questions.highlight: Each time the bell rings, the students change classrooms.

questions.prompt: Whenever Mia visits her grandmother, she brings some fruit.
questions.promptZh: 每當米婭探望祖母，她都會帶一些水果。
questions.answer: Each time Mia visits her grandmother, she brings some fruit.
questions.answerZh: 米婭每次探望祖母，都會帶一些水果。
questions.highlight: Each time Mia visits her grandmother, she brings some fruit.

questions.prompt: The project moves forward one step whenever a task is completed.
questions.promptZh: 每完成一項任務，項目便向前推進一步。
questions.answer: Each completed task moves the project one step forward.
questions.answerZh: 每項完成的任務都會令項目向前推進一步。
questions.highlight: Each completed task moves the project one step forward.

questions.prompt: A separate delay is caused by every missing document.
questions.promptZh: 每份欠缺的文件都會造成一次額外延誤。
questions.answer: Each missing document causes a separate delay.
questions.answerZh: 每份欠缺的文件都會造成一次額外延誤。
questions.highlight: Each missing document causes a separate delay.

questions.prompt: Every user receives a confirmation email from the system.
questions.promptZh: 每名用戶都會收到系統發出的確認電郵。
questions.answer: The system sends each user a confirmation email.
questions.answerZh: 系統向每名用戶發送一封確認電郵。
questions.highlight: The system sends each user a confirmation email.

questions.prompt: A separate record is generated whenever a new order arrives.
questions.promptZh: 每當有新訂單，系統便會產生一項獨立記錄。
questions.answer: Each new order generates a separate record.
questions.answerZh: 每張新訂單都會產生一項獨立記錄。
questions.highlight: Each new order generates a separate record.

questions.prompt: The librarian stamps all the books one by one before lending them out.
questions.promptZh: 圖書館職員在借出所有書籍前逐一本蓋印。
questions.answer: The librarian stamps each book before lending it out.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館職員在借出每本書前都會蓋印。
questions.highlight: The librarian stamps each book before lending it out.

questions.prompt: Every light left on in an empty room wastes electricity.
questions.promptZh: 空房內每盞仍然亮着的燈都會浪費電力。
questions.answer: Each light left on in an empty room wastes electricity.
questions.answerZh: 空房內每盞仍然亮着的燈都會浪費電力。
questions.highlight: Each light left on in an empty room wastes electricity.

questions.prompt: No driver may move off before checking the mirrors.
questions.promptZh: 司機在檢查倒後鏡前不得開車。
questions.answer: Each driver must check the mirrors before moving off.
questions.answerZh: 每名司機在開車前都必須檢查倒後鏡。
questions.highlight: Each driver must check the mirrors before moving off.

questions.prompt: The manager reviews all complaints personally, one at a time.
questions.promptZh: 經理會親自逐一審視所有投訴。
questions.answer: The manager reviews each complaint personally.
questions.answerZh: 經理會親自審視每宗投訴。
questions.highlight: The manager reviews each complaint personally.

questions.prompt: Having one more child brings one more financial responsibility.
questions.promptZh: 多一個孩子，便會多一份經濟責任。
questions.answer: Each additional child means an extra financial responsibility.
questions.answerZh: 每多一個孩子，就意味著多一份經濟責任。
questions.highlight: Each additional child means an extra financial responsibility.

questions.prompt: All departments are required to submit their own monthly reports.
questions.promptZh: 所有部門都必須提交自己的每月報告。
questions.answer: Each department must submit its own monthly report.
questions.answerZh: 每個部門都必須提交自己的每月報告。
questions.highlight: Each department must submit its own monthly report.

questions.prompt: Before leaving, all patients receive clear instructions from the hospital.
questions.promptZh: 所有病人在離開前都會收到醫院提供的清晰指示。
questions.answer: The hospital gives each patient clear instructions before they leave.
questions.answerZh: 醫院在每名病人離開前，向他們提供清晰指示。
questions.highlight: The hospital gives each patient clear instructions before they leave.

questions.prompt: Whenever one small improvement is made, the service becomes slightly easier to use.
questions.promptZh: 每當作出一項小改善，服務便會變得稍為容易使用。
questions.answer: Each small improvement makes the service slightly easier to use.
questions.answerZh: 每項小改善都會令服務變得稍為容易使用。
questions.highlight: Each small improvement makes the service slightly easier to use.

questions.prompt: The website creates a separate tracking number for every parcel.
questions.promptZh: 網站會為每件包裹建立一個獨立的追蹤編號。
questions.answer: The website creates a separate tracking number for each parcel.
questions.answerZh: 網站會為每件包裹建立一個獨立的追蹤編號。
questions.highlight: The website creates a separate tracking number for each parcel.

questions.prompt: The presentation is divided so that every team member is responsible for one part.
questions.promptZh: 簡報被分成不同部分，讓每名團隊成員負責其中一部分。
questions.answer: Each team member is responsible for one part of the presentation.
questions.answerZh: 每名團隊成員負責簡報的其中一部分。
questions.highlight: Each team member is responsible for one part of the presentation.

questions.prompt: Every participant gets a chance to practise speaking through the programme.
questions.promptZh: 每名參加者都可透過這個計劃獲得練習口語的機會。
questions.answer: The programme gives each participant a chance to practise speaking.
questions.answerZh: 這個計劃給每名參加者一個練習口語的機會。
questions.highlight: The programme gives each participant a chance to practise speaking.

questions.prompt: Every additional passenger causes a slight increase in the fuel cost.
questions.promptZh: 每多一名乘客，燃料成本便會略為增加。
questions.answer: Each extra passenger increases the fuel cost slightly.
questions.answerZh: 每多一名乘客，燃料成本便會略為增加。
questions.highlight: Each extra passenger increases the fuel cost slightly.

questions.prompt: The organiser checks all the names one by one against the registration list.
questions.promptZh: 主辦者把所有姓名逐一與報名名單核對。
questions.answer: The organiser checks each name against the registration list.
questions.answerZh: 主辦者把每個姓名與報名名單核對。
questions.highlight: The organiser checks each name against the registration list.

questions.prompt: All decisions made during the planning stage have an effect on the final result.
questions.promptZh: 在規劃階段作出的所有決定都會影響最終結果。
questions.answer: Each decision made during the planning stage affects the final result.
questions.answerZh: 在規劃階段作出的每個決定都會影響最終結果。
questions.highlight: Each decision made during the planning stage affects the final result.
